untranslatable_reason: Signal requires domain-specific commodity indicators not in allowed list: inventory_percentile (3-year historical), days_to_cover, production schedule lead times, and storage_cost_index. These are fundamental supply/inventory metrics unavailable in standard OHLCV-based indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using price_pos_20 (percentile position in 20-day range) as proxy for inventory depletion state, and hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) as proxy for storage cost pressure and volatility spike anticipation. Exit conditions mapped to ±10% returns move and price position extremes. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification. Note: This translation loses critical inventory and supply chain semantics—full implementation requires custom data feeds for commodity inventory levels and production schedules.
